title: Sun-Dried Tomato Ramen
description: A flavorful and comforting Japanese-inspired dish featuring sun-dried tomatoes and ramen noodles.
instructions: Bring the vegetable broth to a boil in a large pot.
Add the ramen noodles and cook according to package instructions.
In a separate pan, heat the sesame oil over medium heat.
Add the sun-dried tomatoes and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Stir in the soy sauce and cook for an additional minute.
Add the cooked noodles to the pan and toss with the sun-dried tomato mixture.
Garnish with dried green onions and serve hot.
Optional: Add sliced green onions or sesame seeds for added flavor and texture.
